task_completion.description: Verify the custom CRS code is set to 990001.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the GeoServer 'New SRS' or 'SRS List' page, the 'EPSG Code' field should contain the value '990001'.

task_completion.description: Verify the correct WKT definition is provided for the custom CRS.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the GeoServer 'New SRS' page, the 'WKT' text area should contain the provided PROJCS string. Look specifically for 'Pacific Mercator' and 'PARAMETER["central_meridian", 150.0]'.

task_completion.description: Verify a new layer is published with the correct name and workspace.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the GeoServer 'Edit Layer' page, the 'Name' field should be 'ne_countries_pacific' and the workspace should be 'ne'. The source should be indicated as the 'ne_countries' table.

task_completion.description: Verify the Declared SRS is set to the newly created custom CRS.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the 'Coordinate Reference Systems' section of the layer configuration, the 'Declared SRS' field must be set to 'EPSG:990001'.

task_completion.description: Verify the SRS Handling is configured to reproject.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'SRS handling' dropdown menu must be set to 'Reproject native to declared'.

task_completion.description: Verify the bounding boxes have been computed.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the 'Bounding Boxes' section, both 'Native Bounding Box' and 'Lat/Lon Bounding Box' must have numerical coordinate values filled in (not empty), indicating the 'Compute from data' and 'Compute from native bounds' links were clicked.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the GeoServer web GUI.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show a web browser navigating the GeoServer administration interface at localhost:8080/geoserver/web/, not just terminal curl commands.

integrity.description: Verify the WKT was actually entered into the GeoServer application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The WKT string must be visible inside the GeoServer web form text area, not just in a separate text editor or terminal window.

integrity.description: Verify the agent attempted to save the layer configuration.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent clicking the 'Save' button at the bottom of the layer configuration page, or the 'ne_countries_pacific' layer appearing in the final 'Layers' list.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The custom CRS code must be exactly '990001'. The WKT must use the Mercator_1SP projection with a central meridian of 150.0 degrees (look for PARAMETER["central_meridian", 150.0]). The layer must be named 'ne_countries_pacific' and use 'EPSG:990001' as the Declared SRS. The base data is from the 'ne_countries' table in the 'postgis_ne' store.
